title: Ship Arrival and Departure
summary: Arrival and departure coordination for bridge team readiness, pilot exchange, and mooring preparation.

excerpts.heading: Arrival bridge preparation
excerpts.summary: Confirm pilot station, tugs, mooring stations, and bridge briefing before arrival.
excerpts.body: Before arrival, confirm pilot ladder readiness, tug plan, mooring station readiness, and brief the bridge team on roles, speeds, and communication channels.

excerpts.heading: Departure bridge preparation
excerpts.summary: Verify departure passage, engine readiness, and line handling coordination before letting go.
excerpts.body: Before departure, review the departure passage, engine and steering readiness, tug instructions, line handling sequence, and contingency actions with the bridge team.
